features.featureTitle: Implement a mobile-first React SPA (max-width 430px, centered on desktop) using the specified color scheme: Primary #0F172A, Accent #22C55E, Background #F1F5F9, Danger #EF4444, Card Background #FFFFFF, Text Primary #1E293B, Text Secondary #64748B. Apply a premium, polished Android-app aesthetic with rounded cards (border-radius 16px), smooth tab-switch animations, and consistent typography throughout.

Build a bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home (Dashboard), Calendar, Analysis, Reports, Settings. The active tab should be visually highlighted with the accent green color. Navigation must switch views without page reload.

Build the Dashboard (Home) tab with: a header showing 'GharKharcha' logo and 'Namaste! 🙏' greeting; a prominent card showing today's total expense; a card showing this month's total expense; a budget remaining card (green text if under budget, red if over); a Recharts PieChart showing category-wise spending for the current month with legend; a recent transactions list (last 5 entries) where each row shows category emoji icon, name, amount in ₹ formatted Indian style, and date in DD MMM YYYY format; and a Smart Insights section with auto-generated insight cards.

Build a floating action button (FAB) on the Dashboard (bottom-right, green #22C55E, circular with + icon) that opens an Add Expense bottom sheet/modal. The modal must include: a large ₹ amount input; a category dropdown with emoji icons (🛒 Grocery, 🏠 Rent, ⚡ Electricity, 💧 Water, 🔥 Gas, 💳 EMI, 🏫 School Fees, 🏥 Medical, 🚗 Travel, 🛍️ Shopping, 📦 Other); a date picker defaulting to today; payment mode pill buttons (Cash, UPI, Card, Bank); an optional notes field; and a full-width green Save button. The same modal must support Edit mode when editing an existing expense, pre-filling all fields.

Build the Analysis tab with two sub-tabs: Monthly and Yearly. Monthly sub-tab: month/year selector with prev/next arrows; big total monthly expense number; a budget progress bar (spent vs budget); percentage comparison with previous month with up/down arrow indicator; a Recharts PieChart for category-wise distribution; a Recharts BarChart for daily spending trend across the month; top spending category highlight; budget status badge (green = under, red = over). Yearly sub-tab: year selector; Recharts BarChart for month-wise totals (Jan–Dec); total yearly expense; average monthly expense; highest spending month highlighted; savings estimate (annual income minus yearly expense).

Build the Reports tab with a filter panel containing: a from–to date range picker; a category multi-select (all 11 categories); a payment mode filter (Cash, UPI, Card, Bank, All). Below the filters, render a filtered results list showing matching expenses with category icon, name, date, payment mode, and amount. Show a summary bar with total filtered amount and count of transactions. Provide three export buttons: PDF (triggers browser print of the filtered list), CSV/Excel (downloads a .csv file), and Share (copies a text summary to clipboard).

Build the Smart Insights section (rendered on the Dashboard as a scrollable card section). Insights must be dynamically calculated and include: per-category spend this month in Hindi-style English text (e.g., 'Aapne is mahine Grocery par ₹X kharch kiya'); category-level comparison with last month showing % increase/decrease; a budget alert card when 80%+ of monthly budget is consumed; saving tip suggestions; and a highest-spending category alert card. Each insight is displayed as a distinct card with a colored icon.

Build the Settings tab with the following functional sections: Monthly Budget input (₹, save updates backend); Annual Income input (₹, save updates backend); Currency display showing ₹ INR (read-only); Dark Mode toggle that applies a dark theme across the entire app; PIN Lock toggle that, when enabled, prompts the user to set a 4-digit PIN and requires that PIN on app launch; Clear All Data button that shows a confirmation dialog before deleting all expenses; About section showing app name 'GharKharcha' and version '1.0.0'.

Implement global UX polish across the app: toast notifications for save, update, and delete actions; confirmation dialogs before any destructive action (delete expense, clear all data); empty state messages with descriptive text when no data exists for a view; Indian Rupee formatting (₹1,23,456 style) for all monetary values; DD MMM YYYY date format throughout; and loading states while data is being fetched from the backend.
